title: AI-native Growth Marketing Associate (f/m/d)- Full remote

Otera is the enterprise-grade Agentic Automation platform enabling teams to put their complex knowledge work on autopilot. By combining Agentic AI, business process digitization, and no-code development in a single platform, teams can create AI apps in minutes to achieve 90%+ straight-through processing.

description_full:
👋 About Us

Otera is the enterprise-grade Agentic Automation platform enabling teams to put their complex knowledge work on autopilot. By combining Agentic AI, business process digitization, and no-code development in a single platform, teams can create AI apps in minutes to achieve 90%+ straight-through processing.

With €15 million raised in a Series A funding round co-led by Red River West, Alpha Intelligence Capital, and Hoxton Ventures, and the support of existing investors Lunar Ventures and Stride VC, we are accelerating our vision to become the go-to provider for AI-driven automation solutions across the globe.

Otera is trusted by global enterprise leaders, including Allianz, Siemens, Bayer, SAAB, and Hannover Re.

💼 About The Role

We’re hiring an AI-native Growth Marketing Associate to help us move faster across growth, website, and execution.

This is a high-ownership role for someone who is equal parts operator, builder, and problem solver. You’ll work closely with the Head of Marketing and take over core website-related work, from landing pages and content updates to CMS management and on-site optimization- while supporting broader growth initiatives across the business.

We’re looking for someone who is hands-on, fast, technical enough to ship independently, and excited to use AI as a force multiplier in their day-to-day work.

🔥 Key Responsibilities


Own the website as a core growth channel
Build, update, and optimize landing pages and site content
Manage the CMS and keep the website fast, accurate, and high-conviction
Execute growth experiments across messaging, conversion, and acquisition
Use AI tools to accelerate research, content production, workflow automation, and execution
Work directly with the CMO on high-priority projects across growth and operations
Spot bottlenecks, fix things quickly, and bring structure to ambiguous problems
Help turn ideas into shipped work- fast


😊 About You


Ideally, you have experience in growth marketing, digital marketing, or a founder’s associate / chief of staff-type role
You’re AI fluent and already use AI tools in a practical, high-output way
You’ve built or significantly worked on a website before
You’re comfortable with HTML/CSS and can make changes without hand-holding
You know your way around a CMS and can publish, edit, and maintain pages with confidence
You have strong execution skills and a bias toward action
You’re highly organized, highly detail-oriented, and can manage multiple moving pieces
You’re excited by early-stage environments where ownership is high and structure is evolving
Familiarity with AEO, SEO, analytics, CRO, or A/B testing is a plus
Fluency in English
Strong writing and content instincts are a plus
Comfort working cross-functionally with design, product, and external partners is preferred


⛳️ Compensation, Perks & Benefits


Remote Work & Culture: Enjoy the freedom to work from anywhere.
Be among the first 90 to revolutionize industry standards and be part of the next unicorn.
Gain access to top-tier advisors and investors in their fields.
Work with high-quality, state-of-the-art equipment.
Competitive Salary Package


We value diversity and promote it through empathy and respect. We assess based on professional skills, not on social background, gender, age, religion, sexual orientation, or skin colour.

Looking forward to receiving your application!
